summary: Simplifies the sidebar by removing Developer Projects, moving project cleanup into Clean My Mac, and pinning Activity Log and Settings in a separate General section at the bottom.
introduced: General sidebar section — Activity Log and Settings grouped at the bottom, separate from the reorderable Menu
changed: Developer Projects removed from the sidebar — node_modules, Build Artifacts, and Virtual Environments are now tabs under Clean My Mac
Menu section — only Disk Analysis, Duplicates Finder, Clean My Mac, System Cleanup, and System Optimization are draggable
Shorter descriptions for Clean My Mac, Developer Projects (internal), and System Cleanup maintenance sections
